gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/441)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/441)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ صَلَاةِ الْكُسُوفِ فِي وَقْتِ الْفَرِيضَةِ فَقَالَ ابْدَأْ بِالْفَرِيضَةِ فَقِيلَ لَهُ فِي وَقْتِ صَلَاةِ اللَّيْلِ فَقَالَ صَلِّ صَلَاةَ الْكُسُوفِ قَبْلَ صَلَاةِ اللَّيْلِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Al-Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al-A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws), said, ‘I asked himasws about Salāt of the eclipse during a time of the Obligatory (Salāt). So heasws said: ‘Begin with the Obligatory (Salāt)’. So it was said to himasws, ‘(Supposing it was) at the time of the night Salāt?’ So heasws said: ‘Pray the Salāt of the eclipse before the night Salāt’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is a narration from him (narrator of previous Hadith) by Muhammad ibn af-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from af-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked one of the two Imam, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, about performing Salah (prayer) because of eclipse at the time of obligatory Salah (prayer). He (the Imam) said, ‘Begin with obligatory Salah (prayer).’ He (the Imam) was asked, ‘Can it be performed in the time of nightly optional Salah (prayer)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Perform Salah (prayer) because of eclipse before nightly optional Salah (prayer).”’
